_purpose: Wave-based sitemap rollout (PRD 4.3, docs/SEO.md 5). Each wave lists device slugs to include in sitemap.xml: either the string "featured" (resolves to data/seo/featured-devices.json) or an explicit slug array. Append new waves as GSC indexing health allows (<=100 device pages/week in month one); adding a wave is a data change, not a code change.
